title: Choose the calendar duration of a Vimshottari year

positions.summary: Convert each dasha year to 365.2425 elapsed days for reproducible ISO timestamps.
Savana or other conventional year lengths produce different calendar dates and require an explicit future policy.

default_policy.rationale: The value is explicitly declared and stable across platforms.

user_disclosure: Displayed Vimshottari timestamps use 365.2425 elapsed days per computational year; another convention may shift dates.
